name: Earth Science Tech, Inc.
business: Earth Science Tech, Inc. operates as a diversified holding company in the health and wellness sector, integrating compounding pharmacy, telemedicine, clinical support, and patient fulfillment. It also has a real estate and asset management arm and an 80%-owned direct-to-consumer kitchen products brand. The company sells compounded medications, telemedicine consultations, healthcare services, and innovative kitchen products.

exposures.sentence: The core of the Company's value proposition is the seamless integration of patient care, from consultation to fulfillment.
MagneChef 80%-owned direct-to-consumer kitchen products brand using proprietary intellectual property.
MagneChef 80%-owned direct-to-consumer kitchen products brand using proprietary intellectual property.
The Company completed construction of a residential property during the period, which is currently available for sale, at a total capitalized cost of $371,684.

catalysts.sentence: We currently operate under the Fourth Temporary Extension of COVID-19 Telemedicine Flexibilities, which permits our affiliated healthcare providers to prescribe Schedule II-V controlled substances via telemedicine through December 31, 2026, without a prior in-person evaluation.
